mapper.select:
SELECT menuId, parentMenuId, menuName, menuLevel, menuIcon, menuDirYn, programId, sortOrder, site FROM menu_info
useYn = 'Y'
AND site = #{site}
ORDER BY menuLevel ASC, sortOrder ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu_info WHERE menuId = #{menuId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu_info WHERE parentMenuId = #{menuId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE menu_info SET menuName = #{menuName}, menuLevel = #{menuLevel}, menuDirYn = #{menuDirYn}, programId = #{programId}, sortOrder = #{sortOrder}, useYn = #{useYn},
parentMenuId = #{parentMenuId},
site = #{site},
updatedDate = NOW() WHERE menuId = #{menuId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu_info (menuId, parentMenuId, menuName, menuLevel, menuIcon, menuDirYn, programId, sortOrder, useYn, site) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{parentMenuId}, #{menuName}, #{menuLevel}, #{menuIcon}, #{menuDirYn}, #{programId}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn}, #{site})
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT('MENU', LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(menuId, 5) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0')) FROM menu_info WHERE menuId REGEXP '^MENU[0-9]+$'
